narrative:
Darby-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 789 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
